imdbData.plot: In 1900, a white woman was murdered in Chinatown in San Francisco, and the suspect was a Chinese man. The murder caused social shock, and people demanded the closure of Chinatown.

imdbData.title: Phenomena
imdbData.plot: Three middle-aged women who investigate paranormal events are put to the test when their leader Father Pilón disappears. Inspired by the real Hepta Group.

imdbData.title: The Brutalist
imdbData.plot: A visionary architect flees post-war Europe in 1947 for a brighter future in the United States and finds his life forever changed by a wealthy client.

imdbData.title: DIG! XX
imdbData.plot: DIG. XX looks at the collision of art and commerce through the star-crossed friendship and bitter rivalry of dueling rock bands - The Dandy Warhols and The Brian Jonestown Massacre. DIG. XX is the 20th anniversary extended edition...

imdbData.title: Lies and Ex Wives: Secrets on Maple Street
imdbData.plot: When Katie started dating her divorced neighbor, she expected the usual Maple Street rumors. But when her fiancé's ex-wife turns up dead, she realizes she faces a threat far more deadly than gossip.
